html:
If you're in a country like France, where buying fans for your daughter's schools is not allowed [0], or installing your own store-bought AC unit either, making DIY devices seems the easy part, sadly.

[0]: (French) https://www.lexpress.fr/environnement/canicule-il-offre-dix-...

[1]: (French) https://www.lemonde.fr/argent/article/2026/06/19/canicule-de...
